workflow_interpretation: Identify the acquired exposure or capability that supports the thesis.
Price paid determines required synergy, margin and ROIC burden.
Strategic fit must connect to customer value or value-chain control.
Separate acquired growth from organic growth.
Acquisitions can dilute margins even when strategically attractive.
Execution risk should stay explicit until integration evidence appears.
Do not credit cross-sell without evidence.
Value capture is not proven until ROIC path is credible.
Debt, dilution and cash use affect downside path.
Define the next evidence point that validates or weakens the acquisition thesis.
